title: Wire network and static/manual locations into unified provider
description: Why this exists: project-LICHEN-zte2 acceptance requires network-derived and manual/static locations to use the same internal representation as hardware and app-injected locations. The core HAL provider supports NETWORK and MANUAL_STATIC source classes, but no producer path currently submits those samples. What needs to be done: define the no-hardware producer surfaces for network-derived and configured static/manual location, submit them through lichen_hal_location_submit(), document precedence/override behavior at the integration point, and add native_sim/qemu tests. Acceptance criteria: tests cover a configured manual/static location overriding lower-priority fixes, a network-derived location fallback path, stale suppression, and status metadata source_name/source_class; two code-review passes are completed.
notes: Implemented shared no-hardware producer APIs for network-derived and configured manual/static location samples: lichen_app_interface_submit_network_location() and lichen_app_interface_submit_manual_location(), with dedicated HAL bridge entry points that force NETWORK and MANUAL_STATIC source classes and reject mismatched explicit source_class/fix_source metadata. Generic lichen_app_interface_submit_location() remains local-client only, preventing app/local-client callers from escalating to manual/static priority. Tests added for app-interface network/manual submission, manual override of network/onboard fixes, stale manual fallback to network, selected stale manual suppression, direct HAL stale-manual-to-network fallback, and gateway status manual_static source_name/source_class metadata. Concrete ingestion surfaces remain deferred and parent-blocking: project-LICHEN-zte2.8 configured manual/static producer, project-LICHEN-zte2.9 network-derived producer. Reviews: Arendt clean no P0/P1/P2 on first diff; Parfit found P1/P2 scope/test gaps in generic API, fixed by API split and follow-up Beads; Nietzsche clean no P0/P1/P2 after split; Dirac clean no P0/P1/P2; Singer clean no P0/P1/P2; Nash clean no P0/P1/P2 with P3 residual no-HAL coverage and mismatch-negative coverage suggestions. Validation: git diff --check passed; EC2 Twister final command passed: west twister -T lichen/tests/app_interface -T lichen/tests/hal -T lichen/tests/gateway_status -p native_sim -p qemu_x86 --inline-logs --integration --outdir twister-out-network-manual-location-v2 -x=ZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=$PWD/lichen. Result: 7/8 configs passed, 1 static skip, 100 cases, 26 skipped, 0 failures/errors/warnings, 136.73s. Superseded pre-split Twister also passed but is not final evidence.
close_reason: Completed shared no-hardware network/manual-static producer APIs and tests; concrete configured/network ingestion captured in parent-blocking follow-ups project-LICHEN-zte2.8 and project-LICHEN-zte2.9.
